## Summary

Cleans up collateral residue left after the accelerated PR #747 rescue/merge.

This PR does not change runtime behavior. It only:

- Updates the archived PR #747 body so it no longer says `processor.real-gate.test.ts` was an unrelated known failure after the fixture was repaired.
- Records that Phase 3 test fixtures now require `accepted_story_ledger_v1` with a governance rail and layer decisions.
- Improves reliability-page wording without using canon-triggering criteria aliases.
- Adds a short engineering cleanup note.

## Scope

In scope:

- Documentation/body cleanup.
- Public-copy cleanup that remains canon-safe.
- Engineering note documenting why the cleanup exists.

Out of scope:

- Review Gate runtime changes.
- Scoring changes.
- Phase 2 criteria logic.
- Phase 3 synthesis.
- WAVE runtime.
- Quality Gate behavior.
- Provider calls.
- Database migrations.
- Revise Queue implementation.

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

Low risk. This is a cleanup-only PR intended to reduce historical confusion after a fast merge.
